name: cognitive-diplomat-negotiation-predictor
description: Topcoder Cognitive Diplomat negotiation next-turn predictor.

requirementMapping.REQ_01_predict_api: src/server.ts exposes POST /v1/predict on port 3000 and validates the challenge request schema.
requirementMapping.REQ_02_three_persona_parallel_fanout: src/predictor.ts launches exactly three persona LLM calls with Promise.all before synthesis.
requirementMapping.REQ_04_per_request_memory: src/memory.ts stores retrieval, persona outputs, and synthesis trace per request.
requirementMapping.REQ_05_deterministic_synthesis: src/predictor.ts calls the synthesis LLM with temperature 0 and fixed seed 424242.
requirementMapping.REQ_06_backend_models: src/llm.ts forwards model IDs unchanged to Ollama or an OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
requirementMapping.REQ_07_response_contract: src/types.ts and src/predictor.ts produce the required response shape.
requirementMapping.REQ_08_tests: src/test/*.test.ts verifies validation, RAG, heuristics, persona count, and synthesis settings.
requirementMapping.REQ_09_readme_video_verification: ../readme.md contains the video URL placeholder and reviewer verification guide.
